title: feat: add client-side rate limiting for platform API calls
body:
## Context

PR #334 introduces platform API calls (device flow, config fetch, token refresh) without client-side rate limiting. While the server enforces rate limits, the CLI should be a good citizen and self-limit.

## Proposal

Add `golang.org/x/time/rate` based client-side rate limiting:
- Device flow initiation: max 1/minute
- General API calls: configurable burst (e.g., 10 req/s burst, 2 req/s sustained)
- Honor server `Retry-After` headers

## Notes

- RFC 8628 `slow_down` handling is already implemented in PR #334
- Server-side rate limiting is the primary defense; this is defense-in-depth
